task.name: Remove tagIds from useExpenseTransactionsQuery
task.action: In `src/hooks/useExpenseTransactionsQuery.ts`: 1. Remove `tagIds?: string[];` from `UseExpenseTransactionsOptions`. 2. Remove `tagIds?: string[]` from `fetchExpenseTransactions` function signature (6th param). 3. Remove `if (tagIds && tagIds.length > 0) params.append('tagIds', tagIds.join(','));` from the fetch function body. 4. Change destructure in `useExpenseTransactionsQuery` from `{ skip, take, search, dateFilter, accountId, tagIds }` to `{ skip, take, search, dateFilter, accountId }`. 5. Remove `tagIds` from the query key object: `{ skip, take, search, dateFilter, accountId }`. 6. Remove `tagIds` from the `queryFn` call: `fetchExpenseTransactions(skip, take, search, dateFilter, accountId)`.
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/hooks/useExpenseTransactionsQuery` — no failures. Confirm no TypeScript errors with `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | grep -i "useExpenseTransactionsQuery"` (should return nothing).

task.name: Remove tagIds from useIncomeTransactionsQuery
task.action: In `src/hooks/useIncomeTransactionsQuery.ts`: Apply the same 6 changes as the expense hook above: 1. Remove `tagIds?: string[];` from `UseIncomeTransactionsOptions`. 2. Remove `tagIds?: string[]` from `fetchIncomeTransactions` function signature. 3. Remove `if (tagIds && tagIds.length > 0) params.append('tagIds', tagIds.join(','));`. 4. Change destructure to `{ skip, take, search, dateFilter, accountId }`. 5. Remove `tagIds` from query key object. 6. Remove `tagIds` from queryFn call.
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/hooks/useIncomeTransactionsQuery` — no failures.

task.name: Remove tagIds from useTransferTransactionsQuery
task.action: In `src/hooks/useTransferTransactionsQuery.ts`: Apply the same 6 changes: 1. Remove `tagIds?: string[];` from `UseTransfersOptions`. 2. Remove `tagIds?: string[]` from `fetchTransfers` function signature. 3. Remove `if (tagIds && tagIds.length > 0) params.append('tagIds', tagIds.join(','));`. 4. Change destructure to `{ skip, take, search, dateFilter, accountId }`. 5. Remove `tagIds` from query key object. 6. Remove `tagIds` from queryFn call.
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/hooks/useTransferTransactionsQuery` — no failures.

phase.name: Remove tagIds from API route GET handlers

task.name: Remove tagIds filtering from expense-transactions GET
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/app/api/expense-transactions/route.test.ts` — all tests pass.

task.name: Remove tagIds filtering from income-transactions GET
task.action: In `src/app/api/income-transactions/route.ts`, apply the same removal of the `tagIds` searchParams block in the GET handler. Keep Zod schema and POST handler unchanged.
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/app/api/income-transactions/route.test.ts` — all tests pass.

task.name: Remove tagIds filtering from transfer-transactions GET
task.action: In `src/app/api/transfer-transactions/route.ts`, apply the same removal of the `tagIds` searchParams block in the GET handler. Keep Zod schema and POST handler unchanged.
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/app/api/transfer-transactions/route.test.ts` — all tests pass.

task.name: Remove TagFilter from ExpenseTable
task.action: In `src/components/tables/expenses/ExpenseTable.tsx`: 1. Remove `import { TagFilter } from '@/components/shared/TagFilter';`. 2. Remove `const [selectedTagIds, setSelectedTagIds] = useState<string[]>([]);`. 3. In the `filteredData` useMemo, remove the "Tag ID filter" block (the `if (selectedTagIds.length > 0) { ... }` block). 4. Remove `selectedTagIds` from the useMemo dependency array. 5. Remove the `<TagFilter selectedTagIds={selectedTagIds} onChange={setSelectedTagIds} />` JSX. 6. Check if `useTagsQuery` is still needed — it IS used by `TagsCell` in this file, so keep the import.
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/components/tables/expenses/ExpenseTable.test.tsx` — tests pass (tag filter tests will be removed in Phase 5, so some may fail now; that is expected).

task.name: Remove TagFilter from IncomeTable
task.action: In `src/components/tables/income/IncomeTable.tsx`: 1. Remove `import { TagFilter } from '@/components/shared/TagFilter';`. 2. Remove `const [selectedTagIds, setSelectedTagIds] = useState<string[]>([]);`. 3. In the `filteredData` useMemo, remove the "Tag ID filter" block. 4. Remove `selectedTagIds` from the useMemo dependency array. 5. Remove the `<TagFilter>` JSX. 6. `useTagsQuery` is used by `TagsCell` — keep the import.
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/components/tables/income/IncomeTable.test.tsx` — some tag filter tests may fail (removed in Phase 5).

task.name: Remove TagFilter from TransferTable
task.action: In `src/components/tables/transfers/TransferTable.tsx`: 1. Remove `import { TagFilter } from '@/components/shared/TagFilter';`. 2. Remove `const [selectedTagIds, setSelectedTagIds] = useState<string[]>([]);`. 3. In the `filteredData` useMemo, remove the "Tag ID filter" block. 4. Remove `selectedTagIds` from the useMemo dependency array. 5. Remove the `<TagFilter>` JSX. 6. `useTagsQuery` is used by `TagsCell` — keep the import.
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/components/tables/transfers/TransferTable.test.tsx` — some tag filter tests may fail (removed in Phase 5).

phase.name: Clean up mobile view and page components

task.name: Remove TagFilter from TransactionsMobileView
task.action: In `src/components/transactions/TransactionsMobileView.tsx`: 1. Remove `import { TagFilter } from '@/components/shared/TagFilter';`. 2. Remove the three state declarations: `expenseSelectedTagIds`, `incomeSelectedTagIds`, `transferSelectedTagIds` and their setters. 3. Remove the three `useEffect`s that reset display count on tag ID change (lines like `useEffect(() => { setExpensesDisplayCount(ITEMS_PER_LOAD); }, [expenseSelectedTagIds]);`). 4. Remove `tagIds: expenseSelectedTagIds` from the `useExpenseTransactionsQuery` call. 5. Remove `tagIds: incomeSelectedTagIds` from the `useIncomeTransactionsQuery` call. 6. Remove `tagIds: transferSelectedTagIds` from the `useTransfersQuery` call. 7. Remove the three `<TagFilter>` JSX elements (one per tab). 8. Update the three `isFiltering` flags to remove `*SelectedTagIds.length > 0`: - `isExpenseFiltering` = `debouncedExpenseSearch.length > 0 || expenseDateFilter !== dateFilterOptions.viewAll` - `isIncomeFiltering` = `debouncedIncomeSearch.length > 0 || incomeDateFilter !== dateFilterOptions.viewAll` - `isTransferFiltering` = `debouncedTransferSearch.length > 0 || transferDateFilter !== dateFilterOptions.viewAll`
task.verify: Component should compile. Tests will be updated in Phase 5.

task.name: Remove TagFilter from expenses/page.tsx
task.action: In `src/app/expenses/page.tsx`: 1. Remove `import { TagFilter } from "@/components/shared/TagFilter";`. 2. Remove `const [selectedTagIds, setSelectedTagIds] = useState<string[]>([]);`. 3. Remove `useEffect(() => { setDisplayCount(ITEMS_PER_LOAD); }, [selectedTagIds]);`. 4. Remove `tagIds: selectedTagIds,` from the `useExpenseTransactionsQuery` call. 5. Remove the `<TagFilter>` JSX element. 6. Update `isFiltering` to: `debouncedSearchTerm.length > 0 || dateFilter !== dateFilterOptions.viewAll`.
task.verify: Run `npm run lint` on the file — no errors.

task.name: Remove TagFilter from income/page.tsx
task.action: In `src/app/income/page.tsx`: 1. Remove `import { TagFilter } from '@/components/shared/TagFilter';`. 2. Remove `const [selectedTagIds, setSelectedTagIds] = useState<string[]>([]);`. 3. Remove `useEffect(() => { setDisplayCount(ITEMS_PER_LOAD); }, [selectedTagIds]);`. 4. Remove `tagIds: selectedTagIds,` from the `useIncomeTransactionsQuery` call. 5. Remove the `<TagFilter>` JSX element. 6. Update `isFiltering` to: `debouncedSearchTerm.length > 0 || dateFilter !== dateFilterOptions.viewAll`.
task.verify: Run `npm run lint` on the file — no errors.

task.name: Remove TagFilter from transfers/page.tsx
task.action: In `src/app/transfers/page.tsx`: 1. Remove `import { TagFilter } from '@/components/shared/TagFilter';`. 2. Remove `const [selectedTagIds, setSelectedTagIds] = useState<string[]>([]);`. 3. Remove `useEffect(() => { setDisplayCount(ITEMS_PER_LOAD); }, [selectedTagIds]);`. 4. Remove `tagIds: selectedTagIds,` from the `useTransfersQuery` call. 5. Remove the `<TagFilter>` JSX element. 6. Update `isFiltering` to: `debouncedSearchTerm.length > 0 || dateFilter !== dateFilterOptions.viewAll`.
task.verify: Run `npm run lint` on the file — no errors.

task.name: Remove TagFilter tests from ExpenseTable.test.tsx
task.action: In `src/components/tables/expenses/ExpenseTable.test.tsx`: 1. Remove the `vi.mock('@/components/shared/TagFilter', ...)` block. 2. Remove the entire `describe('tag filter — client-side filtering', ...)` block and all its child tests. 3. Clean up any unused imports that result from these removals.
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/components/tables/expenses/ExpenseTable.test.tsx` — all remaining tests pass.

task.name: Remove TagFilter tests from IncomeTable.test.tsx
task.action: In `src/components/tables/income/IncomeTable.test.tsx`: 1. Remove the `vi.mock('@/components/shared/TagFilter', ...)` block. 2. Remove the entire `describe('tag filter — client-side filtering', ...)` block. 3. Clean up unused imports.
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/components/tables/income/IncomeTable.test.tsx` — all remaining tests pass.

task.name: Remove TagFilter tests from TransferTable.test.tsx
task.action: In `src/components/tables/transfers/TransferTable.test.tsx`: 1. Remove the `vi.mock('@/components/shared/TagFilter', ...)` block. 2. Remove the entire `describe('tag filter — client-side filtering', ...)` block. 3. Clean up unused imports.
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/components/tables/transfers/TransferTable.test.tsx` — all remaining tests pass.

task.name: Remove TagFilter tests from TransactionsMobileView.test.tsx
task.action: In `src/components/transactions/TransactionsMobileView.test.tsx`: 1. Remove the `vi.mock('@/components/shared/TagFilter', ...)` block. 2. Remove the following describe blocks and all their child tests: - The `it('renders the TagFilter in the expenses tab', ...)` test. - `describe('TagFilter integration — expenses tab', ...)`. - `describe('tab independence — tag filter state is per-tab', ...)`. - `describe('hook wiring — tagIds are passed to data hooks', ...)`. 3. Update any remaining tests that assert on `tagIds` in hook calls — remove `tagIds` from expected call arguments. 4. Clean up unused imports.
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/components/transactions/TransactionsMobileView.test.tsx` — all remaining tests pass.

phase.name: Delete TagFilter component and final verification

task.name: Delete TagFilter component and test files
task.verify: Confirm both files are deleted. Run `grep -r "TagFilter" src/` — should return zero results.

task.name: Full verification pass
task.action: Run the complete verification suite: 1. `npm run lint` — zero errors. 2. `npm run build` — zero errors. 3. `npx vitest run` — all tests pass. 4. Verify no references to `TagFilter` remain in `src/`. 5. Verify no `tagIds` references remain in hooks or API route GET handlers (only in Zod schemas and POST/PATCH handlers).
task.verify: All three commands pass clean. Create `docs/search-tags-cleanup-verification.md`.
